name: myco
description: Myco — agent-first cognitive substrate. 18 manifest-driven verbs (germinate / hunger / eat / sense / forage / assimilate / digest / sporulate / traverse / propagate / immune / senesce / fruit / molt / winnow / ramify / graft / brief) over a self-validating markdown+YAML filesystem. 25 lint dimensions enforce contract invariants mechanically. Adds a myco-substrate skill that onboards the agent when the user's workspace contains `_canon.yaml` or the user mentions Myco-flavoured operations.
